headline: Intel (INTC) Raises Server Chip Prices As AI Demand Pushes Supply Limits
summary: Intel is increasing prices on key server and laptop CPUs as demand for its server chips exceeds available supply. The company is currently negotiating longer term pricing and volume agreements with customers. This move is tied to rising AI infrastructure demand that is straining industry supply chains. Intel, ticker NasdaqGS:INTC, is making this pricing move with its shares around $109.84 after a very large 1 year return and a 178.9% gain year to date. Those gains come despite the stock...
